열왕기상 17:1.content: Elijah the Tishbite, who was one of the settlers of Gilead, said to Ahab, “As Yahweh, the God of Israel, lives, before whom I stand, there shall not be dew nor rain these years, but according to my word.”

열왕기상 17:2.content: Then Yahweh’s word came to him, saying,

열왕기상 17:3.content: “Go away from here, turn eastward, and hide yourself by the brook Cherith, that is before the Jordan.

열왕기상 17:4.content: You shall drink from the brook. I have commanded the ravens to feed you there.”

열왕기상 17:5.content: So he went and did according to Yahweh’s word; for he went and lived by the brook Cherith that is before the Jordan.

열왕기상 17:6.content: The ravens brought him bread and meat in the morning, and bread and meat in the evening; and he drank from the brook.

열왕기상 17:7.content: After a while, the brook dried up, because there was no rain in the land.

열왕기상 17:8.content: Yahweh’s word came to him, saying,

열왕기상 17:9.content: “Arise, go to Zarephath, which belongs to Sidon, and stay there. Behold, I have commanded a widow there to sustain you.”

열왕기상 17:10.content: So he arose and went to Zarephath; and when he came to the gate of the city, behold, a widow was there gathering sticks. He called to her, and said, “Please get me a little water in a jar, that I may drink.”

열왕기상 17:11.content: As she was going to get it, he called to her, and said, “Please bring me a morsel of bread in your hand.”

열왕기상 17:12.content: She said, “As Yahweh your God lives, I don’t have a cake, but a handful of meal in a jar, and a little oil in a jar. Behold, I am gathering two sticks, that I may go in and bake it for me and my son, that we may eat it, and die.”

열왕기상 17:13.content: Elijah said to her, “Don’t be afraid. Go and do as you have said; but make me a little cake from it first, and bring it out to me, and afterward make some for you and for your son.

열왕기상 17:14.content: For Yahweh, the God of Israel says, ‘The jar of meal will not run out, and the jar of oil will not fail, until the day that Yahweh sends rain on the earth.’ ”

열왕기상 17:15.content: She went and did according to the saying of Elijah; and she, and he, and her house, ate many days.

열왕기상 17:16.content: The jar of meal didn’t run out, and the jar of oil didn’t fail, according to Yahweh’s word, which he spoke by Elijah.

열왕기상 17:17.content: After these things, the son of the woman, the mistress of the house, became sick; and his sickness was so severe that there was no breath left in him.

열왕기상 17:18.content: She said to Elijah, “What have I to do with you, you man of God? You have come to me to bring my sin to memory, and to kill my son!”

열왕기상 17:19.content: He said to her, “Give me your son.” He took him out of her bosom, and carried him up into the room where he stayed, and laid him on his own bed.

열왕기상 17:20.content: He cried to Yahweh, and said, “Yahweh my God, have you also brought evil on the widow with whom I am staying, by killing her son?”

열왕기상 17:21.content: He stretched himself on the child three times, and cried to Yahweh, and said, “Yahweh my God, please let this child’s soul come into him again.”

열왕기상 17:22.content: Yahweh listened to the voice of Elijah; and the soul of the child came into him again, and he revived.

열왕기상 17:23.content: Elijah took the child, and brought him down out of the room into the house, and delivered him to his mother; and Elijah said, “Behold, your son lives.”

열왕기상 17:24.content: The woman said to Elijah, “Now I know that you are a man of God, and that Yahweh’s word in your mouth is truth.”
